response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  d.cal_dt,
  SUM(dsa.tot_sls_amt) AS dly_sls_agg_total,
  SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS ord_hdr_non_cancelled_total,
  SUM(dsa.tot_sls_amt) - SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS reconciliation_variance
FROM main.dly_sls_agg dsa
LEFT JOIN main.date_dim d ON dsa.agg_dt_key = d.date_key
LEFT JOIN main.ord_hdr oh ON d.date_key = oh.date_key AND oh.sts_cd <> 'X'
GROUP BY d.cal_dt
ORDER BY d.cal_dt;",
  "reason": "Compares daily sales aggregate totals to non-cancelled order revenue by date to identify reconciliation gaps."
}
```
